idea.title: Boba Rush
idea.hook: Run a cozy bubble-tea bar — pour, top, and serve each customer's order before their patience runs out. New flavors and a faster rush every minute.
idea.hook_ru: Управляй уютным чайным баром — наливай, добавляй топпинг и подавай заказ каждого гостя, пока не лопнуло терпение. Новые вкусы и всё более быстрый наплыв каждую минуту.
idea.prototype: Portrait, tap-to-assemble bubble-tea management. Top third = a queue of cute creature customers, each with a speech-bubble order (cup colour = tea base, symbol = topping) and a draining patience RING. Bottom third (thumb zone) = a big current-cup preview + two rows of ingredient buttons (tea bases, toppings). Two inputs only: (1) tap an ingredient to add it to the current cup, (2) tap a customer to serve them that cup. Correct match → coins + tip + pop + cup clears; wrong → cup trashed + small patience penalty, customer keeps waiting; a ✕ trash target dumps a bad cup. Non-timer pressure = customer patience as a 3-strike lives system (3 walk-outs = game over), with a secondary queue-overflow 'heat' that drains all rings faster. Endless escalating shift: every ~60-90s a NEW flavour/topping/2-topping-combo/VIP/popping-pearl unlocks while spawns speed up and patience drains faster. Coins → between-rush upgrades (faster serve, +1 queue slot, slower drain, auto-ice, combo multiplier). Combo multiplier for back-to-back serves. Score = coins + customers served; milestone goals (10/25/50…) surfaced as a live next-goal banner.
idea.mutation_of: synthesis of idle_tycoon CTR archetype + cozy_cute/weird_creature cafe trend; no direct portfolio parent (first bubble-tea / drink-assembly management game in the portfolio)
idea.why_novel: First cafe / drink-assembly time-management sim in the portfolio. Crosses the day's two strongest CTR signals — idle_tycoon (market-radar weight 3962: Merge Dale, Firestone, Drift Tycoon) and the cozy_cute cute-cafe trend (Capy Cafe, Cattosu Chonk) — onto a tap-to-assemble core that none of our existing games use. Mechanically distinct from our merge titles (beast_bazaar / critter_keep / merge_conquest) and from the cleaning/satisfying line (clean_sweep, ice_cleanup): the verb is build-order-and-serve-under-patience-pressure, a management loop, not a merge or a sweep. Deliberately leans into the genre family with the highest retention ceiling in our analytics (tycoon 100% like-ratio; cleaning/satisfying loved at 94%).
idea.non_timer_pressure: customer patience as a lives/strikes system — each waiting customer's patience ring drains to 0 → walk-out = 1 strike; 3 strikes = game over. Secondary queue-overflow 'heat' makes every ring drain faster while the counter is full. No global countdown timer.
idea.lose_condition: gs='GAMEOVER' when strikes >= 3 (three patience-zero walk-outs). Reachable from doing nothing in under 60s — verified at ~16s with queue overflow.

sources.title: Merge Dale
sources.snippet: idle_tycoon / puzzle_objects market anchor — glossy tactile objects, money/upgrade loop visible at a glance. Borrowed object scale + glossy contrast for the cover.

sources.title: Cattosu Chonk! Cat Merge
sources.snippet: Cozy creature-merge trend — adorable round creatures + cozy progression. Signal for the cute-customer + cozy-cafe direction.

sources.title: Capy Cafe
sources.snippet: Cozy cafe-management trend — running a cute cafe as the core fantasy. Direct genre signal for a bubble-tea bar management loop.

sources.title: knowledge-2026-06-01.md — retention ceilings
sources.snippet: Portfolio analytics: tycoon/merge are our highest-retention-ceiling genres (tycoon 100% like-ratio); cleaning/satisfying loved at 94%. Drove the choice to build a management/sim loop in the tycoon-adjacent family.

synthesizer_brief: Synthesised by crossing today's idle_tycoon CTR archetype (radar weight 3962) with the cozy_cute cute-cafe trend (Capy Cafe, Cattosu Chonk) and our own portfolio knowledge that tycoon/merge are our highest-retention-ceiling genres — landing on a glossy, snackable bubble-tea bar where the hero object is an oversized boba cup and the customers are delighted round creatures. Built as the addictive-10-minute-loop milestone only (no cross-session retention this pass).

alternatives.title: Fresh Merge Variant
alternatives.hook: Another merge-the-objects board with a fresh theme.
alternatives.why_novel: Rejected — the merge space is already well-mined by beast_bazaar + critter_keep + merge_conquest; a fourth merge would cannibalise rather than expand the portfolio.

alternatives.title: Auto-Battler
alternatives.hook: Draft units and watch them fight automatically across escalating rounds.
alternatives.why_novel: Rejected — overlaps merge_conquest's draft-and-fight loop too closely to justify a separate build.

alternatives.title: Mining / Smelting Tycoon
alternatives.hook: Dig ore, smelt it, and upgrade your foundry in an idle production chain.
alternatives.why_novel: Rejected — overlaps the just-shipped smelter_tycoon's production-chain loop; too soon to repeat the smelting fantasy.
